title: 6 Pcs Opener Gripper Pads, Multifunctional Rubber Bottle Opener, Non-slip Gripper Pads for Elderly People with Arthritis and Weak Hands (6 Colors)
description:
About this item
Package Contents: You will receive 6 pieces of bottle opener gripper pads, 2 shapes and 6 colors, square (green, red, gray) and round (yellow, purple, blue), bright colors add a lot of color to the kitchen.
High-Quality Non-slip Material: The corkscrew gripper pad is made of high-quality rubber, soft, elastic, and unique textured design. Enhanced friction with the lid of the can makes it more slip-resistant, giving you a better experience of use.
Easy To Use: you just need to put the gripper pad on the bottle cap that needs to be opened, rotate the bottle cap, and the lid will be easily opened, suitable for women, children, and the elderly.
Product Size: The diameter of the round is about: 4.9 inches, and the size of the square is about: 50.3x50.3 inches.
Scope Of Use: The bottle opener has a variety of uses, in addition to being used as a bottle opener, it can also be used as a coaster, heat insulation pad, anti-scald pad. It is a great tool to use.
reviews_5s: These thin little discs of rubber are just the perfect size and texture to use by anyone, but especially the elderly who need them to provide the extra grip needed to open jars and bottles.Help getting containers openPerfect set and high quality!!Work greatI have arthritis in both hands and with these grips I can open everything!! Easy to use and very convenient.They work great. I would never be able to open a jar without themI have thicker versions of these grippers however they do the job.
reviews_1s: These items arent sticky enough to hold like ones I've had in the past. I would not buy them again
